theme_notes: The US-Iran peace deal signed today with the Strait of Hormuz officially reopening; the 2026 FIFA World Cup's first full week including Australia shocking Turkey 2-0 and the US thrashing Paraguay 4-1; Russia's missile strike on Kyiv's millennium-old Pechersk Lavra UNESCO monastery.
settled: The Strait of Hormuz reopened today. You two are already ahead of the Middle East.
Even the Iran deal closed. And that one had sanctions.
The World Cup has messier scorelines than this. You win.
youOwe: Less than a World Cup stadium beer. Still owed. Still noted.
Iran and the U.S. settled wars over bigger numbers. Venmo them.
Russia bombed a UNESCO site today. You bombed someone's trust with $40.
That's a World Cup group-stage ticket. Upper deck. Behind a pillar.
Trump opened the Strait of Hormuz via Truth Social. You can open Venmo.
Australia shocked Turkey. Your debt shocks no one anymore.
The Strait of Hormuz handles 20% of global oil. You're handling 0% of this bill.
US beat Paraguay 4-1 at the World Cup. You can't score once on Venmo.
The World Cup is literally in your country. You are literally in debt.
Iran needed 60 days and a ceasefire to move this kind of money. You just need Venmo.
Russia bombed a thousand-year-old monastery. Your debt has also outlived its welcome.
Australia upset Turkey. The real upset is you still haven't paid.
Iran's nuclear program is still unresolved. Bold strategy having two loose ends.
Business class to a World Cup semifinal. You're not going anywhere, with interest.
Trump brokered Middle East peace by Truth Social post. What's your excuse?
Russia bombed a UNESCO World Heritage site. You've done comparable financial damage.
The Strait of Hormuz is more open than your wallet. It was literally blockaded.
Iran stopped a war today. You haven't stopped owing money. Consider your priorities.
theyOwe: The cheapest World Cup ticket costs more. Collect from the moral high ground.
Even Iran settled faster. And they had sanctions.
Smaller than a matchday program. Still rightfully yours.
Enough for a decent World Cup bar tab. Your bar tab, not theirs.
The Strait of Hormuz got unblocked today. Their Venmo didn't.
Australia upset Turkey on pure belief. Believe you'll get paid.
World Cup group-stage ticket money. Someone's living your dream on your dime.
Iran wrapped a war. You can't wrap a $300 debt.
The US beat Paraguay 4-1. You can't get a 1-0 win on Venmo.
The Strait of Hormuz moves 20% of global oil. Your money moves nothing.
Russia bombed a UNESCO heritage site. Your partner bombed your budget. File the claim.
A World Cup quarterfinal ticket. Watching the tournament on your savings.
Trump brokered a US-Iran deal in days. Your deal is still in 'preliminary talks.'
Iran's nuclear future is unresolved. Apparently so is this.
That's a World Cup final seat. They're watching their dreams on your money.
The Strait of Hormuz was blockaded for months, then opened in one day. Be the ceasefire.
More than Australia needed to topple Turkey. Claim your upset.
At this level, start calling it a sanctions package.
